---
page-layout: full

title: "Jun Yamamoto"
subtitle: PhD candidate in Network Science <br> Department of Network and Data Science, Central European University
image: assets/images/prof_pic.jpeg
about:
  id: profile
  template: solana
  image-width: 8em
  links:
    - text: '{{< fa solid file title=File logo label="File logo" >}} CV'
      href: assets/cv_jyamamoto.pdf
      # https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OkcJaa4jIXrGtG6E9YWIWxu_WiJdUZBS/view?usp=sharing
      aria-label: "CV logo"
    - text: '{{< fa envelope title="Envelope logo" label="Envelope logo" >}} Mail'
      href: "mailto:jun.j.yamamoto@gmail.com"
      aria-label: "Envelope logo"
    - text: '{{< ai orcid title="ORCID logo" label="ORCID logo" >}} ORCID'
      href: "https://orcid.org/0009-0009-5089-3269"
      aria-label: "ORCID logo"
    - text: '{{< ai google-scholar title="Google Scholar logo" label="Google Scholar logo" >}} Google Scholar'
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ILnN9b4AAAAJ"
      aria-label: "Google Scholar logo"
    - text: '{{< fa brands bluesky >}}'
      href: "https://bsky.app/profile/jymmt.bsky.social"
      aria-label: "BlueSky logo"
    # - text: '{{< fa brands twitter >}}'
    #   href: "https://twitter.com/__jymmt__"
    #   aria-label: "Twitter logo"
    - text: '{{< fa brands linkedin >}}'
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/jun-yamamoto-579916199"
      aria-label: "LinkedIn logo"
html:
  self-contained: true
---

::: {#profile}
:::

I am a PhD candidate in Network Science in the [Department of Network and Data Science](https://networkdatascience.ceu.edu/) at [Central European University](https://www.ceu.edu/) in Vienna. 
My research develops analytical and numerical methods for complex networks whose effective structure is shaped not only by adjacency, but also by physical node volumes, spatial embedding, and multiscale organization.

The ongoing projects at CEU include **eigenmode delocalization** in physical Laplacians and **modular synchronization** in networks of spin Hall nano-oscillators. 
I am supervised by Prof. [Márton Pósfai](https://networkdatascience.ceu.edu/people/marton-posfai) and Prof. [János Kertész](https://networkdatascience.ceu.edu/people/janos-kertesz).



※日本語のプロファイルは[こちら](https://researchmap.jp/jun_yamamoto)を参照して下さい．

::::{.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8 style="text-align: left;"}

## Education

- **PhD in Network Science**, In progress. <br> 
  *Department of Network and Data Science, Central European University*   
  Vienna, Austria.

- **MSc in Mathematics**, **2023**. <br>
  *School of Mathematical Sciences, Queen Mary University of London*   
  London, UK.

- **BEng in Applied Physics**, **2022**. <br>
  *Department of Applied Physics, Faculty of Engineering, Hokkaido University*   
  Sapporo, Japan.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 style="text-align: left;"}

## Interests

- Complex networks
- Network coarse-graining
- Laplacian dynamics
- Network physicality
- Multi-scale organization & scale-invariance

:::

::: {.g-col-12 style="text-align: left;"}

## News

- **2026-06-15**: I will be visiting the [Barabasi Lab](https://barabasilab.com/) at Northeastern University in Boston, USA, for a research stay as an [Accelnet-Multinet fellow](https://www.accelnet-multinet.org/).

- **2026-02-17**: I presented a poster titled "When node volume matters: Spectral transitions in physical Laplacians" at the [Network Science Seminar AY2025/26](https://www.network-science-seminar.com/activities/2025) in Kyoto, Japan.

- **2026-02-16**: I visited Prof. [Johan Åkerman](http://www.akermanlab.com/) at Tohoku University in Japan.

- **2026-02-10**~**2026-02-13**: I visited Prof. [Takehisa Hasegawa](https://takehisahasegawa.sci.ibaraki.ac.jp/) and Prof. [Shogo Mizutaka](https://mizutaka.cis.ibaraki.ac.jp/) at Ibaraki University in Japan.

- **2026-02-09**: I presented my work at the [Nakao Lab](https://www.k.sc.e.titech.ac.jp/) at Science Tokyo. 

:::

::::
